questions.question: Della Street and Paul Drake helped this character solve mysteries in the book series and TV show.
What Philo T. Farnsworth 1927 invention was finally commercially viable in 1947?
What famous singer and eventual TV hostess had hits in the 1940s with "Yes My Darling Daughter," and "I'll Walk Alone"?
Issued in 1950 and limited at first to a few restaurants, what was the first credit card?
What were you supposed to do if someone told you to "ice it"?
questions.answer: Don't do it, or forget it; cool it
